name: Blueberry Jello Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Jello in boiling water.
2. Drain the berries and pineapple, saving the liquid to make 1 cup; add this liquid to the Jello mixture.
3. Stir in the berries and pineapple.
4. Pour into a 2-quart flat dish and cover.
5. Refrigerate until firm.
6. Combine sour cream, vanilla, cream cheese, and sugar in a separate bowl.
7. Spread over the salad and sprinkle with chopped pecans.
8. Chill until served.
